name: Carta Holdings, Inc.
summary: Carta Holdings, Inc. provides online advertising services in Japan and internationally. It operates through three segments: Partner Sales Business, Ad Platform Business, and Consumer Business. The Partner Sales Business segment offers advertising space and solutions through a media rep. The Ad Platform Business segment operates fluct, an SSP; PORTO, an ad platform for brand advertising; and TELECY, an operational TV commercial platform, as well as ad distribution platforms under the Zucks and BEYOND X names. This segment is also involved in the social media influencer marketing business. The Consumer Business segment owns media under the EC Navi and PeX names; and provides HR and EC related services. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Tokyo, Japan. Carta Holdings, Inc. is a subsidiary of Dentsu Group Inc.
